allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "git add package.json server/db.ts server/routes/webhooks.ts .claude/launch.json; git status --short")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "git add package-lock.json client/package-lock.json; git commit -m ''feat: switch to sql.js \(pure JS SQLite, zero native deps\), add launch.json for preview''; git push origin master")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "git commit -m ''feat: Google Tasks parity — starred tasks, sort \(My order/Date/Starred\), date+time, repeat \(day/week/month/year\), Starred view, indent/unindent API, Material 3 dark theme, completed dates, keyboard shortcuts \(Ctrl+/\)''; git push origin master")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "git add -A; git commit -m ''feat: light/dark mode toggle with system preference detection and localStorage persistence''; git push origin master")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "git add -A; git commit -m ''feat: inline edit, undo toast, search, calendar view, multi-select, swipe-to-complete, list menu, export/import, PWA, auto-refresh, tab badge, empty states''; git push origin master")
